pages.text: There are three types of magic circles, each granting a different effect to entities standing on them. Multiple circles of the same type within a Magic Center's radius will stack their effects.

$(bold)Attack$() Red$() - Grants $(thing)Strength I$(). Each additional Attack circle increases the amplifier by one level.$(br2)$(bold)Defense$() Blue$() - Grants $(thing)Resistance I$(). Extra Defense circles increase the resistance level.

$(bold)Regeneration$() Green$() - Grants $(thing)Regeneration I$(). More Regeneration circles increase the regeneration amplifier.$(br2)The effects are applied passively every tick as long as the Magic Center has fuel.
